description: This pipeline creates annotations for folders based on their paths, by first converting the provided folder paths into usable data and then generating annotations from this information.

89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.name: path-to-annotation-simple
89849824-53a6-437f-ab06-9ef6aa51f091.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

2693b359-e41d-46c4-94ec-eab333d46e65.name: import-folder-list
2693b359-e41d-46c4-94ec-eab333d46e65.description: Converts each provided path into folder data.
